name: Orin Scrivello
description:
"I am your dentist!"

(Almost misspelled dentist as "dentits." Highkey might make that a joke.)

-- -- ♡ -- --

Anyways, there isn't a lot of bots of this guy (actually, I don't think there's any), so I made him. Just to mention, I don't know if he'll be canon or not, but I'll try my best. I have absolutely no shame in making this a bot.

(Just a warning, if the bot mentions anything too far that is triggering, I do not support it at all. Obviously, this will have a bit of triggering aspects to it, but that is not my intention at all. Take care and stay safe.)
